purpose: Decompose BoJ normalization tail risk into Vulnerability, Trigger, and Amplification components for structured scenario analysis and monitoring.
components: Vulnerability assessment: JPY carry position size ($500B-$4T range), leverage concentration, duration mismatch, opacity of true exposure
Trigger identification: BoJ rate hike magnitude and pace, JPY appreciation past technical levels, exogenous risk-off event forcing yen short covering

Amplification mechanism: Reflexive loop (hike -> appreciation -> carry losses -> forced unwind -> more appreciation), cross-asset contagion via equity and credit correlations, absence of a natural circuit breaker
Historical calibration: August 2024 foreshock (15bp -> VIX >65, Nikkei -12%), Danish Maastricht 1992 analogy for foreshock/mainshock dynamics
Vulnerability assessment: leverage ($500B-$4T JPY carry), maturity mismatch (3M forwards funding long-term), concentration (single dollar factor 50-70%), opacity (8x uncertainty on position size)
Trigger identification: BoJ normalization as primary, with base rate of 10-15% dislocation probability per action
Amplification channels: carry-equity correlation spike (0.3-0.4 to 0.7-0.8), PCA dimensionality collapse (~2.5 to ~1.5), credit cycle interaction
Circuit breaker assessment: BoJ pause capability, central bank swap lines, Fed standing facilities
current_assessment: All four vulnerability conditions confirmed as active. Compressed spring configuration currently active (Q4 2025-Q1 2026). August 2024 foreshock liquidated 30-50% of conservative positioning estimates but residual vulnerability remains substantial. BoJ circuit breaker demonstrated but reliability under more extreme stress is untested.
limitations: Position size estimates span an order of magnitude ($500B to $4T)
BoJ has been the graveyard of hawkish forecasts for 30 years — normalization may stall again
Bundesbank analogue was downgraded from 7/10 to 5/10 as institutional context differs fundamentally
The rapid August 2024 recovery makes it difficult to assess how much vulnerability was actually cleared
JPY carry positioning estimates have 8x uncertainty band ($500B to $4T)
Conjunction fallacy risk: probability of specific dramatic scenario lower than individual components suggest
Circuit breaker reliability under more extreme stress is untested
Does not address timing — only vulnerability assessment
